cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Kaja's first combo hero is Lunox. With a beautiful and elegant face, Lunox is still one of the most feared heroes. This Hero Mage is endowed with various skills that make him very dangerous.His ulti, Order and Chaos, allows him to deal great damage and the ability to be immune to skills controlling enemy troops.

With Divine Judgment, he could play a major role in helping Lunox finish off the enemy. If he can defeat one of the enemies, Lunox must immediately activate Order and Chaos Darkening. Then attack the enemy several times using his Chaos Assault skill.

Kaja's second combo hero is Kimmy. This Marksman/Mage hybrid hero is known as one of the most challenging heroes to play. But if you know how to control it, Kimmy will undoubtedly be a battle for the enemy.

The basic attack that can be fired continuously while moving will make the enemy quickly use up HP. Now this deadly skill is quite suitable to be combined with his ulti.


Just wait until it pulls the enemy towards you, activate Kimmy's Energy Transformation, then shoot the enemy's Basic Attack. The fast and massive Magical Damage explosion from this attack will coincide with his Magic RES which will reduce Ulti skills.

Selena is a Mage/Assassin hero with great damage and very unpleasant abilities. Selena's combo skill is Abyssal Arrow which can stun the opponent for a few seconds, at which time she can kidnap the opponent's hero who is hit by her highest skill, Divine Judgment.


Of course, everyone who has ever met Selena knows that her Abyssal Arrow skill can get you in trouble. After hitting Selena catfish, you will get a stun effect within 0.5 to 3 seconds.
During that time, Selena was able to overtake her opponent. What's harder than Selena's Abyssal Arrow Of course, if that skill was related to his judgement. Wait for Selena to throw catfish at her opponent, then Divine Judgment will follow. The enemy is guaranteed not to attack. You must try this Kaja hero combo.

Like Lunox, Harith is also a scary mage hero, because Harith has a kaja cadet, very scary. Harith's Ultimate Skill combo is Age of Force which can give a slow effect to the opponent, and when the opponent gets a slow effect, Kaja can draw a hero from his ultimate skill, Divine Judgment.

The combination of skills that can deal great damage and have a slow impact on opponents is loved by many players in the Land of Dawn.

Harith's Ulti, Age of Power, gave Harith many benefits. Apart from getting a slow effect, the enemy also reduces the cooldown of all Harith's skills. The combination of these two Ulti heroes is guaranteed to confuse the enemy.

Harith's big explosive damage thanks to the reduction of cooldown and lock and the reduction of his Magic RES are guaranteed to kill the enemy immediately.

counters.counter_desc: If you want to render Kaja useless in the game, you need to have Khufra in your hero pool. The Desert Tyrant excels at disrupting enemy initiations with his crowd-control abilities, allowing him to check the enemy fighter supports every attempt to engage.When playing as Khufra, Its important to be mindful of the Nazar King positioning and ultimate cooldown. It would help if you aimed to stay between him and your teams squishy heroes to prevent him from isolating them with his ultimate.When he gets near your teammates, quickly jump at him with your Tyrants Revenge ability. Whether he activates his Divine Judgement or not, continue controlling him to prevent him from completing his initiation.

Using Chou against Kaja is almost a case of fighting fire with fire.

Like the fighter-support hybrid, the Kung Fu Boy has a wide array of tools that allow him to initiate pick-offs. Their ultimates are similar in that the Way of The Dragon isolates and displace one enemy, just as Divine Judgement does.

The difference and Chou best advantage  is his superior mobility.

As Chou, you want to keep mobile and unpredictable to make it harder for Kaja to land his ultimate. Try to stay on the outskirts of fights, darting in only when Kaja is starting to approach your squishy teammates.

While you cannot stop his suppression ability, you can beat him by making the move first with your Jeet Kune Do Way Downloads of the Dragon combo. Make sure to kick him where your teammates are to delete him from the fight.The same concept applies whether you are playing as a roamer or an EXP laner

You might be wondering why Nana is included in this list of hero counters to Kaja. But if you look closely at Sweet Leoni skills, you will find her easily winning the head to head matchup.

As mentioned earlier, Kaja strength lies in controlling enemy heroes. Nonetheless, it is also his greatest weakness. Nana possesses skills that can control and deal damage to the fighter support and make his life miserable in the Land of Dawn.

In the laning stage, you can continually poke him using your Magic Boomerang to deal magic damage and slow effects. All the while, you can plant your Molina Smooch near you to prevent him from even thinking to engage.

Otherwise, he will risk turning himself into a helpless animal an easy target for your teammates.

In the case that you get caught with Divine Judgement, you dont need to worry. Nana Molina Gift passive makes you immune to death, essentially wasting Kaja ultimate.

dominants.dominant_desc:
1) Harassment Combo
Start by hitting enemies with Ring of Order for damage and slow, then follow up with an empowered basic attack from Wrath Sanction. This combination is excellent for harassing opponents in the lane during the early game, as Ring of Order provides decent HP restoration, allowing you to sustain through exchanges.
2) Team Fight Combos
Start by using Ring of Order, then follow up with a basic attack with Wrath Sanction. Next, use Divine Judgement then Lightning Bomb and Flicker to pull enemies carries to your team and close with another Ring of Order. This combo is good for maximizing Kaja damage in picking up enemies.
Begin by swiftly approaching the enemy using Flicker, ensuring they are within range of your Divine Judgment. Then, cast Divine Judgment to disable and paralyze them. Follow up with Lightning Bomb to pull the enemy closer. Use Ring of Order to slow and damage nearby enemies, and finish with an enhanced basic attack. This combo works well for diving enemy carries under their tower.

emblems.emblem_desc: If you ur a roamer. Opt for the Support emblem, for it provides remarkable movement speed and cooldown reduction.

If ur a mid or EXP laner tasked to deal damage, pick the Mage emblem, which grants substantial magic power, magic penetration, and cooldown reduction.Take Rupture in the first tier for adaptive penetration, and Bargain Hunter in the second tier for reduced item costs.Select Lethal Ignition as your core talent, which allows you to inflict additional adaptive damage when you execute your combo.

equips.equip_desc: Building defensive items is the way to go if youre playing as a roamer.Purchase Tough or Warrior Boots with the Conceal roaming blessing, and follow it up with Dominance Ice.If your team is leading in the game, consider investing in Fleeting Time, which significantly reduces the cooldown of your ultimate when you get a kill or assist.

In the early game, poke your enemy in the lane using Ring of Order, followed by the enhanced basic attack from Wrath Sanction.Unless you find yourself heavily disadvantaged in your lane matchup, dont hesitate to engage in exchanges, as Ring of Order provides decent HP restoration, allowing you to sustain through the combat.Once you acquire Divine Judgment, you can perform your full combo. Initiate by cutting the gap against your target using Flicker or Sprint.
Hold them down with Divine Judgment, then drag them toward your allies using Lightning Bomb. Hit them with Ring of Order and enhanced basic attack from Wrath Sanction to deal significant damage.

If your battle spell is on cooldown, you can start your assault with Ring of Order to slow down your target, allowing you to close in and catch them with Divine Judgment.

hero.hero_overview:
Harnessing the power of lightning, Kaja is one formidable support/fighter hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang.

His Divine Judgment ultimate possesses the strongest form of control in the game, suppression, which cannot be removed by Purify or any abilities that can negate debuffs. Additionally, he can drag the enemy hero that he catches with it.
hero.hero_strength: Poke your enemies with the Wrath Sanction-enhanced basic attack whenever it is available.By using the Attack Minion button, you can strike a distant hero by redirecting the lightning attack through nearby minions.Each time Electric Blade deals damage, Kaja restores HP (decays after multiple hits).
hero.hero_weakness: You might be wondering why Nana,Chou,Khufra is included in this list of hero counters to Kaja.

data.recommend: Guide For Kaja Easy Combo For Kaja

spell.spell_desc:
Use Flicker to instantly close in on your enemy, enabling you catch them with Divine Judgment and prevent them from reacting defensively. You can also use it to get out of dangerous situations.
Alternatively, you can choose Sprint for the same purposes, especially if the opposing team possesses numerous slowing abilities. This significantly boosts your movement speed while granting you slow immunity

dominants.dominant_desc: The moment you get your ultimate, actively visit other lane for ganking. Marksman and mage are the best target you can also take the enemy core if possible. Take note of proper positioning as you are most likely be targeted if you are far from allies.

emblems.emblem_desc: Rupture grants additional penetration. Wilderness Blessing for faster map rotation and Impure Rage for damage and mana regen.

equips.equip_desc: Thunder Belt's Thunderbolt and Kaja's passive Wrath Sanction is a very good combination. Plus the bonus hybrid defense stack boosts your survivability over time. Glowing wand for additional movement speed and Lifebane to counter enemy shields and regen. Genius Wand and Holy Crystal for penetration and damage, they make it easier for you to take out enemies as long as it's not too tanky. Immortality for additional defense and resurrection.

hero.hero_overview: Ganking is best when ultimate is available. Prioritize enemies with low defence capabilities especially mage and marksman.
hero.hero_strength: Good initiator, capable of taking out squishy enemies. Being in mid lane gives you the ability to quickly support or gank bottom and top lane.
hero.hero_weakness: Beware of enemies with burst capabilities. As an initiator you'll be most likely targeted. Proper positioning and timing is a must.
